scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir artifacts/firefox --overwrite-dest
scripts.run:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.sign:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node --env-file=.env scripts/check-firefox-sign-env.js && node --env-file=.env ./node_modules/web-ext/bin/web-ext.js sign --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir artifacts/firefox-signed --channel unlisted
